title: Jigsaw Things 2
description: Mod that is focused around adding shower ideas and aspects of russian internet culture to minecraft.
body:
![edge1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cc200f1f6b39352a9f99f36222dc4a51c02183b_0.webp)![edge2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55f0bccf9b34e300c3a5ce90e85da4a43bcd0b22.png)
![jigsaw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf57195c1f7c6d62c65a3e229f9a9d489ed459ca.png)

# [DESCRIPTION]
![A little tease](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/386e1a5a7f44fc3da784446b0442e1a5e8a6400b.png)

### QUALITATIVE. Poop-based, brown-pilled, multi-universal, funky and peculiar continuation of LEGENDARY Jigsaw Things mod.

- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat/versions) compatibility
- Alternative survival recipes with [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)
- [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) guide
- [Jigsaw Chess](https://modrinth.com/mod/jigsaw-chess)

## Here is a brief list of some deranged things mod has:
- **Laxatives** and an intricate system of synthesizing them
- **Teapots!** A whole freaking lot of them actually
- **Gases**, smoke grenades and gas mask
- **Pooping**, and protective gear to keep you safe from laxatives
- Homing baby villagers (poops)
- **ICBM**s supporting every tnt from any mod.
- Almighty moss elephant
- Making poo dynamite from human **FAT**
- ♂️Slave♂️ armor
- Lenin bust that decomposes to **mold** and honey
- Beaver bomb that places fursuit on you
- Particularly **Snide doughball**
- Beaweed, a new plant that is a key to understanding the mod
- Button that spams the debug log
- 3 tiers of elephant pickaxes
- Suicide vests
- Extinguisher
- Jetstream chairs
- Decoration and props
- Fart gun
- Blabits
- Teeth cow infection
- Knife that kills you
- Thigh highs, military boots, moustaches, belly and other stupid apparel
- Pomato
- Fried soup
- ### Try it out yourself and find more!


**100% Vanilla plus**

_Remake of [Jigsaw Things](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jigsaw-things)_
